title: "[SOLVED] composite extension not available"

### Post by MofoVideo on 2008-09-27
I have the same problem  I have a Geforce 8600
I have dual screen The correct nvidia divers 
ccsm installed but when i go to appearance and try anything but none i get composite extension not available 

Can anyone shed some light one this.

here is my xorg.

EDIT:

I took out Xinerama and did Twinview and now everything works.

---
